personal.titulo: Full stack developer · Digital Identity & Blockchain
personal.descripcion: Full stack developer at Telefónica Tech building production-ready digital identity platforms, combining backend APIs, secure authentication and modern web frontends.

parrafos: I am a full-stack developer at Telefónica Tech working on production digital identity platforms within the TrustOS ecosystem. I design backend APIs, build frontend applications and take features through the full lifecycle, from architecture and data modeling to deployment, debugging and performance optimization.

My work focuses on building reliable, secure systems that solve real business problems. I regularly work on verifiable credentials, authentication flows and scalable microservices, ensuring that backend logic, security and user experience fit together coherently.

In parallel, I study at 42 Madrid, where I strengthen my low-level programming skills through intensive C and C++ projects. This background gives me a strong understanding of memory management, algorithms and UNIX internals, shaping a clean, efficient and predictable engineering mindset.

I enjoy projects that combine complex backend logic with clear, intuitive frontends. My goal as an engineer is to design solid architectures, write scalable code and continuously improve as a full-stack professional working on real-world products.

experiencia.descripcion: End-to-end full-stack development, backend APIs, frontend engineering, secure authentication and digital identity platforms.

educacion.descripcion: 42 Madrid · Higher National Diploma in Networked Computer Systems Administration (ASIR)

logros.descripcion: Contributor to Telefónica Tech’s TrustOS ecosystem, anti-fraud platforms and multi-provider verifiable credential infrastructure.

experiencia_laboral.descripcion: Full-stack development across the TrustOS ecosystem, building end-to-end digital identity platforms. I design and implement backend APIs for verifiable credentials, develop Next.js frontends with complex identity flows and integrate secure authentication mechanisms such as mTLS and certificate-based access. I actively contribute to the TrustOS VCS Core API and collaborate with DevOps and product teams to deliver scalable, production-ready solutions on cloud infrastructure.

Corporate IT support and infrastructure setup, including system optimization, remote diagnostics and Windows environment configuration. Deployed LAN networks with CAT6 cabling, switches, routers and IP cameras, documenting all technical inventory and improving workstation performance and reliability.

educacion_completa.descripcion: High-intensity project-based training focused on C, C++, algorithms, UNIX systems and low-level engineering. Built real-world projects including a raycasting engine, a Bash-like shell and complex parsers, reinforcing problem-solving, memory management and systems programming.

educacion_completa.titulo: HND in Networked Computer Systems Administration (ASIR)
educacion_completa.descripcion: Systems administration, networking, Linux, Windows Server, virtualization, hardware maintenance and IT security. Developed strong foundations in technical infrastructure and enterprise IT environments.

proyectos.titulo: TrustOS VCS Core API  Multi-Provider Credential Infrastructure
proyectos.descripcion: Backend infrastructure powering all verifiable credential logic at Telefónica Tech, supporting PrivadoID, Procivis and Idenfy.
proyectos.detalles: TrustOS VCS Core API is the backend service responsible for creating and verifying verifiable credentials (VCs) within the TrustOS ecosystem at Telefónica Tech. It provides a unified and secure abstraction layer for issuing credentials through multiple identity wallets in the market, currently supporting PrivadoID, Procivis, and Idenfy. The API exposes a set of endpoints that allow frontend applications to request the issuance or verification of credentials. Each request includes the required schema-specific payload, which must match the credential schema deployed in the selected wallet provider. Once processed, the API returns a verification or issuance link, which the frontend transforms into a QR code to be scanned by the user's wallet. On the architectural side, the backend follows strict engineering standards using ESLint, Prettier, and Semantic Versioning (SemVer) to maintain code quality and ensure consistent releases. It includes a full suite of unit and integration tests, all of which must pass before the service can be merged and deployed to the main branch. This API acts as the core engine behind multiple TrustOS identity demos and production flows, enabling multi-provider interoperability, secure credential lifecycle management, and scalable enterprise identity solutions.

proyectos.descripcion: Digital identity platform with multi-scenario VC verification, QR issuance, multilingual interface and role-based flows.
proyectos.detalles: TrustOS Verifiable Credentials Platform is a modular Next.js application designed to verify and interact with digital credentials across multiple real-world scenarios. The platform enables citizens, professionals, and authorities to authenticate with their digital wallets, scan QR codes, and validate trusted attributes through secure backend APIs. The frontend handles complex state transitions for each role, includes a multilingual ES/EN interface, and features a full credential viewer capable of rendering dynamic VC data from providers like PrivadoID, Procivis, and Idenfy. It also implements real-time QR verification with status polling to ensure smooth credential exchanges. Architecturally, the system uses modular components, clean separation of flows, and tailored state management patterns, supporting professional IDs, academic degrees, healthcare credentials, and multi-provider identity verification.

proyectos.titulo: FraudeBec  Anti Business Email Compromise Platform
proyectos.descripcion: Corporate anti-fraud system combining mTLS login, Iberpay/Devengo bank verification and verifiable credentials.
proyectos.detalles: FraudeBec is a corporate antiBusiness Email Compromise (BEC) platform designed to prevent fraud in supplier payment workflows. It integrates dual authentication flows (secure mTLS certificate login and a verifiable credentials QR flow), enforced by an Nginx reverse proxy with HMAC-signed requests, AWS ALB mTLS, and strict schema validation. The platform includes real-time bank account verification through the Devengo/Iberpay API to confirm IBAN ownership and prevent fraudulent substitutions. The Next.js frontend provides a supplier onboarding dashboard, secure session handling, and identity validation steps. Fully Dockerized and deployed on AWS, the system ensures strong protection against account hijacking, impersonation, and unauthorized changes to payment destinations.

proyectos.titulo: TrustOS PAN  Agricultural Commodity Certificate Portal
proyectos.descripcion: Portal for certifying agricultural commodity purchases (wheat, grains, raw materials) and anchoring them on blockchain.
proyectos.detalles: TrustOS PAN is a certification portal for agricultural commodity purchases such as wheat, grains, and raw materials. The platform retrieves validated producer certificates and converts them into blockchain-anchored ERC-721 digital assets using the TrustOS Token API. It allows regulatory bodies, producers, and buyers to authenticate the origin, integrity, and traceability of each commodity lot. Once validated, each certificate is cryptographically signed and published on-chain, ensuring tamper-proof verification across the supply chain. The portal includes secure login, JWT-based authorization, AWS SSM-driven configuration management, and an interface for certificate visualization and digital token issuance.

proyectos.descripcion: Gamified corporate identity experience where users share 'superpower' credentials and compare compatibility via QR.
proyectos.detalles: Norteverse is a gamified corporate identity experience developed by Telefónica Tech for commercial and customer-facing events. Participants receive a 'superpower' verifiable credential and compare their attributes via a QR-based verification flow. The platform includes full Procivis integration, dynamic UI routing, real-time polling, MongoDB storage, and a matching engine for compatibility scoring. It has been successfully deployed across multiple corporate events, achieving strong engagement and becoming a recurring Telefónica Tech experience.

proyectos.descripcion: 3D engine in C inspired by Wolfenstein 3D using raycasting.
proyectos.detalles: Implements a full rendering pipeline, DDA raycasting algorithm, collision detection, wall projection, FOV calculations, texture mapping, .cub file parser and pixel graphics using MiniLibX. Demonstrates strong mathematical and low-level programming skills.

proyectos.descripcion: Custom UNIX shell replicating Bash core behavior.
proyectos.detalles: Built a full lexer, parser, AST builder, executor, environment variable system, redirections (<, >, >>, <<), pipes, signals, process handling, custom builtins and robust memory-safe implementations. Shows deep understanding of UNIX internals.
